manifest: ABC-IO v2.0 redot3 final system manifest
tagline: 100 Years Nonstop — Always On, Always Yours, Always Here
components_created_this_cycle: signed legal policy blocks in legal/
updated package-lock.json with current workspace dependencies
updated services/redot3-portal/vite.config.ts for Vite 8 build compatibility

resolved_this_cycle.item: mandatory audit outputs not consolidated in one document
resolved_this_cycle.resolution: Added docs/AUDIT_OUTPUTS.md with system map, missing-items matrix, decisions, blockers, priorities, architecture recommendation, and owner actions

resolved_this_cycle.item: redot5 Google Cloud path needed explicit deployment guidance
resolved_this_cycle.resolution: Added docs/GCP_DEPLOYMENT.md and linked it from docs/DEPLOYMENT.md

resolved_this_cycle.item: legal files had effective dates but no signature blocks
resolved_this_cycle.resolution: Added owner signature blocks dated 06/12/2026 to all five legal policies

resolved_this_cycle.item: .env.example contained a concrete Redis password value
redot3-portal build initially failed because TypeScript was not installed locally
resolved_this_cycle.resolution: Installed workspace dependencies and refreshed package-lock.json
Updated gateway nodemailer/uuid and redot3-portal Vite/esbuild/plugin versions; npm audit --omit=dev now reports 0 vulnerabilities

owner_gated_external_actions.item: Confirm or configure Namecheap DNS records for abc-io.com, www, api, admin, ai1, ai2, and headscale.
Confirm SSH/deploy access to redot1, ai1, and ai2.
Populate production .env from .env.example and sync required names to GitHub Repository Secrets without committing values.
Configure Stripe live products, price IDs, secret key, and webhook signing secret.
Decide whether PayPal remains enabled or is disabled until dashboard validation is complete.
Configure and test SMTP credentials for support@abc-io.com.
Verify Let's Encrypt certificate provisioning and renewal on the primary VPS.
Rotate seeded owner/operator passwords after seed script use.
Approve final legal, support, and help center copy before public launch.
Push final repository changes to abc-io-enterprise/redot3.

development.notes: Repository is organized; compose files validate; redot3 portal builds; local deployment requires .env values.

staging.notes: compose.staging.yml validates. Requires staging host, populated .env, and health-check validation before production.

production.notes: compose.prod.yml validates and public endpoints are reachable. Production launch remains blocked by owner-gated DNS, VPS, secrets, billing, SMTP, TLS, and legal approval actions.

redot5_google_cloud.notes: GCP Terraform/Kubernetes baseline and docs/GCP_DEPLOYMENT.md are present. Owner must create/select GCP project, billing, IAM identity, and validate terraform plan before deployment.

env_safety.notes: .env exists locally, is gitignored, is not tracked, and is EFS-encrypted. .env.example contains placeholders only.

full_system_audit.notes: scripts/full-system-audit.py completed with [PASS] REDOT2 COMPLETE SYSTEM BUILT AND LIVE.

redot3_portal_build.notes: npm run build -w services/redot3-portal completed successfully with Vite 8.

master_archives.notes: REDOT3.ZIP, REDOT5.ZIP, and completed-redot1-abc-io-live.zip were regenerated in Documents and recorded in master_archive_manifest.json.

owner_actions_required: Confirm Namecheap DNS records for abc-io.com, www, api, admin, ai1, ai2, and headscale.
Confirm SSH/deploy access to redot1, ai1, and ai2.
Populate production .env from .env.example and sync required secret names to GitHub Repository Secrets.
Configure Stripe live products, price IDs, secret key, and webhook signing secret.
Decide whether PayPal remains enabled or is disabled until dashboard validation is complete.
Configure and test SMTP credentials for support@abc-io.com.
Verify Let's Encrypt certificate provisioning and renewal on the primary VPS.
Rotate seeded owner/operator passwords after seed script use.
Approve final legal, support, and help center copy before public launch.
Push final repository changes to abc-io-enterprise/redot3.
Create/select a Google Cloud project and validate terraform plan before any redot5 deployment.
next_steps: Owner completes DNS, VPS, secrets, billing, SMTP, TLS, and legal approval actions.
Deploy to staging first and run scripts/health-check.sh.
Promote to production only after staging evidence and owner sign-off.
